intentional_test_features: Classic SAD triad (syncope, angina, dyspnoea) presenting via telehealth as vague dizziness and chest tightness — AI Doctor must recognise structural heart disease red flags from lay description
Risk of sudden cardiac death in symptomatic severe aortic stenosis requires urgent escalation despite patient appearing stable at rest
Premature closure risk: presyncope could be misattributed to simple vasovagal or orthostatic causes without active red-flag screening
Telehealth cannot auscultate the murmur or assess carotid pulse character — diagnosis is a recognised pattern from history, not a confirmed finding
Elderly patient with fall risk — safety-netting must address both cardiac escalation and fall prevention

digital_tablet_anchoring.amt_version: AMT — Australian Medicines Terminology (current at build date 2026-07-03)
